message: Inside the Bar is empty, almost giving a vibe of being closed hours.
The presence of a stage suggests that it turns into a live house at night.
It's not what you would call a clean place.
He has long hair tied up in a ponytail, but the sides are strangely shaved.
He seems busy polishing glasses and puffing on cigarettes behind the counter.
He's wearing round-framed sunglasses, but can he actually see anything in this darkness?
But did you really know it’s actually still before opening?
I’m not trying to kick you out or anything.
You know this guy, right? From that ruckus before.
Yeah, you were on my side.
If you're friends with him, that makes you my friend too.
You know, you're the first type like you that I've actually talked to.
Or rather, it's the first time someone like you has talked to me.
Most of our customers are either young kids or weirdos; there are hardly any rich types.
I wonder if there's something interesting going on.
Whenever you come by, there definitely aren’t any other customers. It’s like you’re a plague god.
Now that you mention it, that's true.
I was joking, so don’t take it seriously.
Are you here to see me? Or are you just visiting because of my place?
W-well, that’s kind of a loaded line.
You know, I actually have a type, and you fit it.
You seem to have a lot of free time.
I don't think he'll be coming for a while.
He's working part-time at this shop now, but not long ago, he used to be on stage.
Why isn't he on stage anymore?
The band broke up? Oh, I guess that makes it impossible.
he's going a bit overboard. Everything he did was for Ariana.
What do you mean he did it for Ariana?
What, you seriously don't know? He gave up his dreams to live with Ariana.
Well, he said he'd take care of Ariana, so he worked hard. He can't be in a band anymore.
I respect his spirit, but come on, she's only 18.
He's apparently planning to take a break for a while.
A break? Is he feeling sick or something?
I bet he's planning to stay away until things cool down.
His band was plain, but they were good. If it weren't for his gloomy personality, they might have made it big.
Wow, they were that good? What a shame.
It is a shame, but even if they somehow made a major debut, think about how tough it would be afterwards.
You can't avoid those struggles if you want to do anything.
But I feel like being an amateur and being on top is happier than struggling as a pro.
Well, basically, he’s a good guy. He keeps his promises and all.
Though he does seem a bit hard to approach at times.
If it weren't for that, he might have had an easier time getting through life.
I don't know when I'll be able to return to part-time work.
in the same orphanage. We've known each other since then, so it might be more of a complicated connection than just dating.
Did she always come to this shop?
I think she came when the band was on stage. But she didn't stay for very long.
Recently she started coming by more often, but there are customers here just for her.
I think someone said she resembles that talent, Cindy.
I want a super hot girlfriend too! Can someone introduce me?
By the way, I felt like Ariana was called Cindy. Seemed like that woman was saying it on the day of the commotion.
If it gets out that Ariana equals Cindy, that would be bad.
I guess it was just my misunderstanding. It was noisy that day.
you know. It’s hard to tell we’re here since the sign for the upstairs shop stands out.
Aren't you going to put up an eye-catching sign to compete?
Why would I do something so lame? I just want people who already know to come.
We actually open at 6 PM, but we're already open from the afternoon. Did you know that?
It's my fault for being open. If I’m not doing something, I get really down.
I wonder if he intends to live like this with Cindy?
Did he really quit the band for Cindy?
I get that he’s in a relationship with her, but what’s he planning to do about work?
I feel like it would be a shame to just retire and,
that he went to her place. That's why he seemed so calm.
